response:
Please help translate this into English with professional language: Thank you for your email. Today's event was indeed very interesting, and both the children, parents, and our teachers thoroughly enjoyed this rare and special time. This positive outcome is entirely due to your great ideas, our team's quick response, and the supportive cooperation among all members. Most valuable of all is that every member of the team was fully committed to ensuring the success of the event.  

As you mentioned, there were indeed several shortcomings in this event. To prevent similar issues from happening in the future, I require every teacher in the K2 team to conduct a summary and reflection. At the same time, please think of improvement strategies to ensure that such situations do not recur, helping our school to continue improving.
